curation_notes: Single file changed: nvflare/lighter/impl/cert.py. The patch replaces pickle serialization with JSON for persisting PKI credential state (root cert and private key). The vulnerable deserialization occurs in the initialize() method via pickle.load(), and the corresponding serialization in finalize() via pickle.dump(). Sibling files (he.py, auth_policy.py) in the same directory do not use pickle. Pre-assigned class insecure-deserialization is correct — CWE-502 maps directly to this class and the diff confirms pickle.load of untrusted data was the vulnerability.
